# James Drayton Trucking and Excavation

### Lincoln City, OR

- [Demolition](https://www.hometowndemolitioncontractors.com/oregon/demolition-contractors-lincoln-city-or)

Write a review [Call](tel:(541) 994-2054)

Get a quote

Overview

Reviews

## Description

James Drayton Trucking and Excavation has been providing the central Oregon Coast with high-quality demolition services for over 40 years. From small residential projects to large scale commercial and municipal projects, James Drayton Trucking and Excavating brings experience and quality to the job site. We work closely with property owners, builders, and designers to ensure the job is done right from start to finish. Contact us today for your free quote.

## Services

- Demolition

- Above Ground Pool Removal
- Asphalt Driveway Removal
- Asphalt Parking Lot Removal
- Barn Demolition
- Chimney Removal
- Commercial Building Demolition
- Commercial Interior Demolition
- Concrete Driveway Removal
- Concrete Foundation Removal
- Concrete Parking Lot Removal
- Concrete Patio Removal
- Concrete Sidewalk Removal
- Debris Hauling
- Deck, Shed, Fence Removal
- Dirt and Rock Removal

View all project types >
